name: Garlic Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tortillas into quarters.
2. Coat each piece with butter-flavored cooking spray and sprinkle with garlic salt.
3. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes or until golden.
5. Allow to cool, then store in an airtight container.
Yield: 16 crisps
Prep Time: 4 mins
Bake Time: 12 mins
